DAMA_Description: Establishes policies, roles, and standards; ensures accountability and compliance across the enterprise. (Hub of the DAMA wheel.)
Gap: No formal governance policy or charter document
Improvement_Initiative: Establish governance policy & AI governance framework

DAMA_Description: Measures and improves the fitness of data for use across DQ dimensions.
Gap: No DQ trend monitoring over time or run scheduling/automation
Improvement_Initiative: Add DQ trend monitoring & run automation

DAMA_Description: Defines and manages data about data (business and technical metadata).
Gap: Static CSVs rather than an active/live catalog
Improvement_Initiative: Move to an active/live metadata catalog

DAMA_Description: Delivers data for reporting, analytics, and decision support.
Gap: No warehouse/serving layer behind the dashboard
Improvement_Initiative: Add a warehouse/serving layer behind the dashboard

DAMA_Description: Designs and maintains the structures and flows that support business strategy.
Defines logical and physical data structures.
Gap: No logical or physical data model

DAMA_Description: Manages authoritative shared reference and master data.
Ensures privacy, confidentiality, and appropriate access through classification, access control, and masking.
Gap: No RBAC, no data masking, no access audit or enforcement
Improvement_Initiative: Implement RBAC, data masking & access audit

DAMA_Description: Manages the movement and consolidation of data across sources and systems.
Gap: No multi-source ingestion or integration framework

DAMA_Description: Manages physical storage, access, and the data lifecycle.
Evidence: data/raw and data/processed flat CSV files
Gap: No storage layering, lifecycle, or operations management
Out of scope for this project
